title: AAVS1 Knock-in
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fm2fs","text":"This protocol describes the standard procedure to knock-in constructs to the AAVS1 safe harbor locus in hPSCs. The AAVS1 knock-in construct, AAVS1-SA-neo-CAGGS-PE2-2A-GFP, can be found at AddGene (Catalog: 180014, RRID:Addgene_180014)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6jgvk","text":"2. Please check for any materials found in those protocols, which might not be listed here","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":6}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"","data":{"cellsMeta":{"A_1":{"className":" "},"B_1":{"className":" "},"C_1":{"className":" "}},"colTitles":["Item","Vendor","Catalog #"],"colWidths":["128","128","128"],"data":[["G418","Life Technologies","11811031"],["PrimeStar GXL DNA polymerase","Takara","R050B"],[" DMEM/F12 "," Thermo Fisher "," 11320082 "],[" Fetal Bovine Serum (FBS) "," Corning "," 35-011-CV "],[" Knockout Serum Replacement "," Thermo Fisher "," 10828-028 "],[" L-Glutamine "," Sigma "," G8540 "],[" Penicillin & Streptomycin (100X) "," Thermo Fisher "," 15140163 "],[" MEM Non-Essential Amino Acids (100X) "," Thermo Fisher "," 11140050 "],[" Heat Stable Recombinant Human FGF2 "," Thermo Fisher "," PHG0360 "],[" 2-Mercaptoethanol "," Sigma "," M3148 "],[" Y-27632 "," Chemdea "," CD0141 "],[" BSA "," Sigma "," A4503 "],[" DMSO "," Fisher Scientific "," BP231-100 "]],"guid":"0BB17A607BF411EC971ACB278AE6204B","isJexcelDataFormat":true,"legend":"","mergeCells":{},"printData":[["G418","Life Technologies","11811031"],["PrimeStar GXL DNA polymerase","Takara","R050B"],[" DMEM/F12 "," Thermo Fisher "," 11320082 "],[" Fetal Bovine Serum (FBS) "," Corning "," 35-011-CV "],[" Knockout Serum Replacement "," Thermo Fisher "," 10828-028 "],[" L-Glutamine "," Sigma "," G8540 "],[" Penicillin & Streptomycin (100X) "," Thermo Fisher "," 15140163 "],[" MEM Non-Essential Amino Acids (100X) "," Thermo Fisher "," 11140050 "],[" Heat Stable Recombinant Human FGF2 "," Thermo Fisher "," PHG0360 "],[" 2-Mercaptoethanol "," Sigma "," M3148 "],[" Y-27632 "," Chemdea "," CD0141 "],[" BSA "," Sigma "," A4503 "],[" DMSO "," Fisher Scientific "," BP231-100 "]],"rowHeights":[23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23]}}}}
steps: One day before nucleofection, prepare two DR4 MEFs 6-well plates.

Nucleofection of Cas9/sgRNA RNP (protospacer sequence, ACCCCACAGTGGGGCCACTA) and AAVS1 knock-in targeting vector is performed using the nucleofection of ribonucleoprotein (RNP) into human pluripotent stem cells (hPSCs) protocol as described in the collection "Nucleofection (Amaxa) and electroporation (Biorad) of hPSCs;" dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b4qnqvve After nucleofection, seed all cells onto two 6-well plates containing hPSCs medium + Rock Inhibitor.
From day 3, change medium daily for 10 days with hPSCs medium with 70 µg/ml G418. Most of the hPSCs will die during the G418 selection.

When large hPSC colonies emerge, manually pick and re-plate them individually in 12-well ICR MEFs plates, as described in the collection "Standard operating procedure for the isolation of genetically engineered hPSCs clones in a high-throughput way;” dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b4mmqu46

When these expanded clones grow to 50%, passage 1/4 to a new well of a 6-well plate for further expanding. For a detailed protocol on passaging hPSCs, refer to the collection "Thawing, Passaging and Freezing of hPSCs on MEFs;" dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b4msqu6e

Freeze the expanded cells when they grow up. For a detailed protocol on freezing hPSCs, refer to the collection "Thawing, Passaging and Freezing of hPSCs on MEFs;" dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b4msqu6e
Genotype crude cell lysate from step 6 using the primers flanking each homologous arm with GXL DNA polymerase. Use unedited cells as a negative control.

PCR with GXL DNA polymerase - Setup A B 1 Ultrapure H2O 11 µl 2 5x GXL buffer 4 µl 3 2.5 mM dNTP 1.6 µl 4 10 µM primer Forward 0.5 µl 5 10 µM primer Reverse 0.5 µl 6 PrimeStar GXL DNA polymerase 0.4 µl 7 Crude cell lysis 2 µl

Touch-down PCR program A B 1 98°C 3 min 2 98°C 30 s 3 70°C (touch down, 1C/cycle) 30 s 4 72°C 1 min 5 Go to 2 12 cycles in total 6 98°C 30 s 7 58°C 1 min 8 72°C 30 s 9 Go to 6 23 cycles in total 10 72°C 7 min 11 4°C or 12°C forever
Run PCR products in agarose gels.
Gel purify the bands of positively targeted clones and perform sanger sequencing to confirm.
Thaw and expand the correctly targeted clones
Test clones for mycoplasma, stain for pluripotent markers, and karyotype

Primer Sequences & Product Size Primers Sequence Product Size 1 SP-AAVS1-HR-L CCCGCTTCAGTGACAACGTC 1313bp 2 ASP-AAVS1-HR-L GAACTCTGCCCTCTAACGCT 3 SP-AAVS1-HR-R TGCATCGCATTGTCTGAGTAG 1184bp 4 ASP-AAVS1-HR-R TACCCCGAAGAGTGAGTTTGC

hPSCs Medium %s %s DMEM/F12 385 ml Fetal Bovine Serum (FBS) 75 ml Knockout Serum Replacement 25 ml L-Glutamine (100X) 5 ml Penicillin & Streptomycin (100X) 5 ml MEM Non-Essential Amino Acids (100X) 5 ml 2-Mercaptoethanol (10,000X) 50 ul Heat Stable Recombinant Human FGF2 (25ug/ml)* 80 ul L-Glutamine (100X) %s %s L-Glutamine, powder 14.6 g MilliQ H2O 500 ml 2-Mercaptoethanol (10,000X) %s %s 2-Mercaptoethanol 0.78 ml MilliQ H2O 9.22 ml Heat Stable Recombinant Human FGF2 (25µg/ml) %s %s Heat Stable Recombinant Human FGF2 500 ug 0.1% BSA 20 ml Y-27632 (1,000X) %s %s Y-27632 5 mg DMSO 1.56 ml hPSCs Medium + Rock Inhibitor %s %s hESCs medium 500 ml Y-27632 (1,000X) 500 ul
Prepare crude cell lysate from the rest of the cells for genotyping as described in the collection “Genotyping by next generation sequencing;" dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b4n3qvgn
creator: Hanqin Li
